themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Commentary leans on "The psalm concludes with absence of blessing: 'Neither do they which go by say, The blessing...". Cross references echo "Blessing".
